srs.title: SRS Settings
srs.description: Configure spaced repetition parameters for optimal learning.

answerMode.title: Answer Mode
answerMode.description: Set how you choose answers during study
answerMode.timingDesc: Rate directly on the front card (tap answer before flipping) or see answer first.

haptics.hint: Vibration feedback on taps, ratings, and actions.

tts.title: Auto TTS Reading
tts.description: Auto-read TTS-enabled fields when flipping card
tts.note: TTS language follows field settings in card template. Play button always shows regardless of auto reading.

srsConfig.title: SRS Configuration
srsConfig.description: Default SRS settings for new decks. Each deck can override these.

aiProviders.title: AI Providers
aiProviders.description: Configure AI providers for card generation. Keys are encrypted on our servers and synced across your devices.
aiProviders.securityNote: API keys are encrypted on our servers (pgcrypto + Vault, never stored in plain text) and synced across your web and mobile devices.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.reminderDesc: You'll be reminded daily at 9:00 AM to review your cards.

account.title: Account
account.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
account.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteFailed: Failed to delete account. Please contact support.

links.userGuideDesc: Feature guide, learning tips, sharing methods

quickActions.shareMessage: Check out ReeeeecallStudy — the smartest flashcard app! https://reeeeecall.com

templates.title: Card Templates
templates.description: Manage card templates, fields, and layouts

publisher.title: Publisher Dashboard
publisher.description: View stats for your published decks

newCardLimit.title: New Card Limit
newCardLimit.hint: The number of new cards automatically added to your daily review queue per deck.

dailyGoal.title: Daily Study Goal
dailyGoal.hint: Set a daily study target in minutes. Leave empty for no goal.

cardUsage.title: Card storage
cardUsage.reached: You’ve reached your card limit. Subscribe to add more.
